title: Authority to create mineral rights
doc_html:
§20.  Authority to create mineral rights

The authority of a tutor, curator, succession representative, or trustee to create a mineral right on property subject to his administration is governed by the laws applicable to each.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§20.  Authority to create mineral rights
The authority of a tutor, curator, succession representative, or trustee to create a mineral right on property subject to his administration is governed by the laws applicable to each.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
